blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,196 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.1" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
